emails.subject: Turlock Irrigation District
emails.body: Turlock Irrigation District Kim, Attached is a draft of the Master Firm Purchase /Sale Agreement for Turlock. I trust you will e-mail same to your customer. If not, please give me a name and phone number and I will forward the agreement. Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Corp. Legal Department 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron.com Phone 713-853-7658 Fax 713-646-3490

emails.subject: RE: Turlock Irrigation District
emails.body: RE: Turlock Irrigation District Debra, I am discussing potential short term transactions with a consultant for California Department of Water Resources. They have requested a sample GISB document that would govern transactions for a term of one month to 12 months max. Can you send me a sample GISB that we would use? Let me know. Thanks, Kim Ward x30685

emails.subject: RE: Turlock Irrigation District
emails.body: Kim, Here is our sample GISB for your customer. Please note that the ENA GISB may only be used for firm deals for 30 days. There is no such limit on interruptible deals. dp To: Perlingiere, Debra
